commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Codex app-server binding/auth routing to preserve selected Codex-native auth profiles, omit incompatible public OpenAI provider metadata for native OAuth bindings, return clean bound-turn failures, add regression tests, and add a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows a saved Codex binding can carry `authProfileId` beside `modelProvider: "openai"`, and thread start/resume uses provider-derived public routing without resolving the selected credential provider.
